content.en:
Soon, Xiao Yue began to officially break through, and the Eternal Dao Seed was officially conceived, and the Eternal Dao Seed crossed the level, but it was still weak, after all, in order to give birth to the Eternal Realm Spirit, the Eternal Dao Seed was absorbed too much power.

However, her physical body began to transform, transforming from a middle-level realm god body to a high-level realm god body.

However, since the Eternal Dao Seed has not yet recovered, its combat effectiveness has not improved much in a short period of time, and it is in a relatively weak state.

This is still the resources she uses to assist in the cultivation of Eternal Realm Spirits, otherwise, the Eternal Dao Seed will be even weaker, and even the combat power is not as good as before the breakthrough!

Another period of time has passed, and Xiao Yue's breakthrough has been officially completed, but he still can't fight in a short period of time, and the Eternal Dao Seed still needs a long period of recovery before he can truly reach the high-level cultivation of the Eternal Realm God Realm. "Three-five-zero" "Yue'er, you have just broken through, let's restore the Eternal Dao Seed here!"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Husband, I know!"

Xiao Yue responded.

......

After Xiao Yue's breakthrough, her daughter Ye Xingyue soon refined the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit of the middle-level peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and she could also impact the high-level Realm God Cultivation.

As a result, Ye Tian also gave a lot of resources to his daughter Ye Xingyue.

These resources are no less than those of his wife Xiao Yue, and Ye Tian also personally guards Ye Xingyue and assists her in making a breakthrough.

But whether Ye Xingyue can break through successfully, Ye Tian is not completely sure.

Soon, Ye Xingyue began to condense the seventh Eternal Realm Spirit.

At the beginning, Ye Xingyue's condensation of the Eternal Realm Spirit was extremely smooth, but at the most critical moment, a mistake appeared.

Click!!!!

With a crisp cracking sound in the darkness, Ye Xingyue's condensation of the Eternal Realm Spirit that was about to be completed shattered.

This fragmentation represented the failure of Ye Xingyue's breakthrough process.

Immediately after, Ye Xingyue's Eternal Dao Seed became extremely weak, and cracks appeared.

Burst!!!!

Ye Xingyue vomited blood, and her whole body was cracking, which showed how serious the impact of this breakthrough failure was.

Ye Tian immediately took action to stabilize Ye Xingyue's injuries.

"Xingyue, take the healing treasure to stabilize the injury. Ye Tian shouted.

Ye Xingyue's face was full of loss, this was the first time she failed to break through, and it had caused such serious consequences.

But she still obeyed her father's words, and immediately took out a bunch of resources that could heal her injuries and swallowed them to refine them to recover her injuries.

As for the injuries of the Eternal Dao Seed, it can only be stabilized at present, and it will take too long to recover, and within the hundreds of billions of Dao Era years, she doesn't want to impact the Eternal Realm God Realm high-level realm cultivator again.

Knowing that Ye Xingyue's breakthrough failed, Xiao Yue and Ye Xingchen immediately came over and comforted them.

Ye Xingyue didn't feel sad for long, she quickly recovered her mood and concentrated on the cultivation process of restoring the Eternal Dao Seed.

Anyway, the Terrans don't need her to worry about it, and her failure to break through doesn't have much impact on the Terrans.

However, Ye Xingyue's breakthrough failure made Ye Xingchen nervous, and he was worried that he would also fail to break through.

After all, theoretically speaking, it is more difficult for him to hit the bottleneck, and the success rate may be lower, after all, his foundation is stronger, and the bottleneck is more stubborn!

......

After another period of time passed, Ye Xingchen finally raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit of the peak of the middle rank of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and he could also impact the high-level realm god cultivation.

However, he came to Ye Tian to talk about this breakthrough.

Ye Xingchen said.

"Xingchen, although your sister said that she failed to break through, she was just not very lucky, in fact, your breakthrough success rate is still fifty percent, and the success rate of other middle-level realm gods is not even one percent, not even one percent, your success rate is already many times theirs, there is no need to be nervous!" Ye Tian comforted.

Under Ye Tian's persuasion, Ye Xingchen gradually regained his self-confidence.

After that, Ye Tian gave the resources to Ye Xingchen, so that Ye Xingchen could impact the bottleneck and condense the seventh perfection-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

Soon. []

Ye Xingchen began to break through the bottleneck to cultivate and condense the seventh perfection-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

After all, Ye Xingchen was still affected by Ye Xingyue's breakthrough failure, even if he regained his self-confidence, but in the process of condensing the seventh perfect level Eternal Realm Spirit, he still almost made mistakes several times, and he trembled all over, obviously the breakthrough process was not very smooth.....

However, he has not yet made such a serious mistake as a breakthrough failure.

In this way, Ye Xingchen's breakthrough process has overcome difficulties again and again.

Ye Tian had been observing, frowning from time to time, he thought that Ye Xingchen was very likely to break through and fail like this, and he was even ready for Ye Xingchen to break through to failure.

But gradually, Ye Xingchen's seventh perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit unexpectedly succeeded in condensing.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised, this was an unexpected success!

After the Eternal Realm Spirit condensed successfully, Ye Xingchen also breathed a sigh of relief, and gradually let the Eternal Dao Seed and the physical body transform, and the cultivation became a formal breakthrough, from the Eternal Realm Divine Realm Intermediate Realm Divine Realm Intermediate Realm God Divine Realm to the Eternal Realm Divine Realm High-level Realm Divine Realm Divine Cultivation.

Like his mother Xiao Yue, after he broke through, he was also very weak, but his face showed an extremely excited look.

Because he officially broke through, he became a high-level realm god cultivator in the Eternal Realm God Realm, and he was placed in the Dongwu Realm, and he was a top existence!

In the following days, Ye Xingchen and Xiao Yue were both working hard to restore the Eternal Dao Species.

With each passing moment, their strength is growing, or rather recovering.

Ten billion to the Dao Era!

20 billion to the Dao Era!

30 billion to the Dao Era!

Five million 0.01 billion to the Dao Era!

After such a long period of time passed, Xiao Yue's Eternal Dao Seed was the first to recover, and he could truly be regarded as a high-level Realm God of the Eternal Realm Realm, and his combat power was extremely powerful, no less than a high-level Realm God who had condensed eight Eternal Realm Spirits.

And not long after, Ye Xingchen also recovered the Eternal Dao Species, and his combat power was even stronger, between the high-level realm gods who had condensed eight Eternal Realm Spirits and nine Eternal Realm Spirits.

It can be said that Ye Xingchen's combat power is only weaker than that of the Guya Realm Gods, and he can crush many high-level Realm Gods.

"The human race has already gathered three high-level realm gods, next, you only need to gather ten middle-level peak realm gods of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and you can make the human race advance to the top force!" Ye Tian thought to himself.
